question: 园区地址在哪
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(park_address) AS 园区地址 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区位置在哪
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(park_address) AS 园区地址 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区负责人是谁
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(park_manager) AS 园区负责人姓名, TO_CHAR(manager_phone) AS 园区负责人手机号 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区安全负责人是谁
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_person) AS 安全负责人姓名, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_mobile) AS 安全负责人手机号 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区负责人联系方式
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(park_manager) AS 园区负责人姓名, TO_CHAR(manager_phone) AS 园区负责人手机号 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区安全负责人联系方式
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_person) AS 安全负责人姓名, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_mobile) AS 安全负责人手机号 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区经历了什么发展历程
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(develop_time) AS 发展历程时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_development WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区荣誉有哪些
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(honor_time) AS 获取荣誉时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_honor WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区公共管廊长度
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 归属园区, TO_CHAR(SUM(pipe_length)) AS 公共管廊总长度 FROM v_ai_ipark_pue_pipe_gallery WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' GROUP BY park_name;

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 归属园区, TO_CHAR(pipe_name) AS 管廊名称, TO_CHAR(pipe_type) AS 设备类型, TO_CHAR(manage_unit_type) AS 管理单位类型, TO_CHAR(glocation) AS 地理位置信息, TO_CHAR(pipe_length) AS 管廊长度, TO_CHAR(pipe_pcs) AS 管廊层数, TO_CHAR(remark) AS 备注, TO_CHAR(use_date) AS 投用日期 FROM v_ai_ipark_pue_pipe_gallery WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区有多少园区公共视频监控设备
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(video_org_type) AS 视频所属组织类型, TO_CHAR(video_type) AS 视频分类（中文） FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区园区公共视频分别监控哪些区域
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(video_org_type) AS 视频所属组织类型, TO_CHAR(video_type) AS 视频分类（中文）, TO_CHAR(channel_name) AS 通道名称 FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区有多少企业视频监控设备
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(video_org_type) AS 视频所属组织类型, TO_CHAR(video_type) AS 视频分类（中文）, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称 FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE (park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ) AND video_org_type LIKE '%企业%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业视频监控设备数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND video_org_type LIKE '%企业%';

question: 园区企业有多少监测指标传感器
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(equip_code) AS 所属设施, TO_CHAR(equip_name) AS 所属设备设置, TO_CHAR(sensor_number) AS 位号, TO_CHAR(target_type) AS 指标类型, TO_CHAR(target_status) AS 指标状态（中文）, TO_CHAR(alarm_status) AS 报警状态, TO_CHAR(threshold_up) AS 阈值 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 监测指标传感器数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区有哪些企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区有几家规上企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 规上企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) = '是';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) AS 是否规上企业, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND rules_on_corporate = '是';

question: 园区有几家国高企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 国高企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%高新技术%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%高新技术%';

question: 园区有几家绿色示范企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 绿色示范企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%绿色示范%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%绿色示范%';

question: 园区有几家单项冠军企业
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%单项%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 单项冠军企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%单项冠军%';

question: 园区有几家专精特新企业
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 专精特新企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) LIKE '%专精特新%';

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%'  AND enterprise_label LIKE '%专精特新%';

question: 园区今年工业总产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(park_output_value)) AS 园区总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%';
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(park_output_value) AS 园区产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

question: 园区今年规上工业总产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(scale_ind_output)) AS 园区规上工业总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(scale_ind_output) AS 园区规上工业产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

question: 园区今年亩均产值
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(output_per_mu)) AS 亩均总产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT report_month AS 上报月份, output_per_mu AS 亩均产值 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

question: 园区今年亩均税收
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(tax_per_mu)) AS 亩均总税收 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_month) AS 上报月份, TO_CHAR(tax_per_mu) AS 亩均税收 FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE TO_CHAR(report_month) LIKE '{year_value}-0%'

question: 园区规划面积
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(planned_area) AS 园区规划面积 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区基本信息
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(planned_area) AS 园区规划面积, TO_CHAR(park_address) AS 园区地址, TO_CHAR(park_manager) AS 园区负责人, TO_CHAR(manager_phone) AS 园区负责人电话, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_person) AS 安全负责人, TO_CHAR(safety_responsible_mobile) AS 安全负责人手机 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(develop_time) AS 发展历程时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_development WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;
SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(park_short_name) AS 园区简称, TO_CHAR(honor_time) AS 获取荣誉时间, TO_CHAR(content) AS 内容 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_park_honor WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' ;

question: 园区某月规上工业产值同比增速
SQL: SELECT c.report_month AS 今年的报告月份, l.report_month AS 前一年的报告月份, TO_CHAR(c.scale_ind_output) AS 当前月份的规上工业产值, TO_CHAR(l.scale_ind_output) AS 前一年的规上工业产值, DECODE(SIGN(NVL(l.scale_ind_output, 0)), 0, NULL, TO_CHAR(ROUND((c.scale_ind_output - l.scale_ind_output) / l.scale_ind_output * 100, 2))) AS 规上工业产值同比增速 FROM (SELECT report_month, DECODE(NVL(scale_ind_output, ''), '', 0, TO_NUMBER(scale_ind_output)) AS scale_ind_output FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE report_month = '{year_value}-{month_value}') c FULL JOIN (SELECT report_month, DECODE(NVL(scale_ind_output, ''), '', 0, TO_NUMBER(scale_ind_output)) AS scale_ind_output FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation WHERE report_month = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('{year_value}-{month_value}', 'YYYY-MM'), - 12), 'YYYY-MM')) l ON 1 = 1;

question: 园区某月风险走势情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(riskTime) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 园区每日最高风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_park_daily_risk_summary_park WHERE park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(riskTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM') = '{year_value}-{month_value}' ORDER BY TO_DATE(riskTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD');

question: 某企业某月风险走势情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(riskDate) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 企业每日最高风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_daily_risk_summary_company WHERE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(riskDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM') = '{year_value}-{month_value}' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '%{company_name}%' ORDER BY TO_DATE(riskDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD');

question: 园区当前的风险分级管控情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(company_type_name) AS 企业类型名称, TO_CHAR(riskObjCount) AS 风险分析对象总数, TO_CHAR(unitCount) AS 风险分析单元总数, TO_CHAR(eventCount) AS 安全分险事件总数, TO_CHAR(measureCount) AS 管控措施总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_risk_obj;

question: 园区近7日的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近7天%';

question: 园区近1月的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近1个月%';

question: 园区近3月的隐患预警统计情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(period) AS 时间, TO_CHAR(majorDangerNum) AS 重大隐患预警数, TO_CHAR(potentialDangerNum) AS 隐患临期提醒数, TO_CHAR(overdueDangerNum) AS 隐患超期提醒数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ipark_dp_supervision WHERE period LIKE '%近3个月%';

question: 园区上周的双重预防机制运行效果如何
SQL: SELECT '岱山经济开发区' AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(COUNT(DISTINCT company_code)) AS 企业总数,TO_CHAR(SUM(DECODE(evaluation_level, '优', 1, 0))) AS 优,TO_CHAR(SUM(DECODE(evaluation_level, '良', 1, 0))) AS 良,TO_CHAR(SUM(DECODE(evaluation_level, '中', 1, 0))) AS 中,TO_CHAR(SUM(DECODE(evaluation_level, '差', 1, 0))) AS 差 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = '{week_value}' AND calendar_year = '{year_value}';

question: 园区隐患排查与整改情况如何
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR('其他企业') AS 企业类型, TO_CHAR(other_enterprise_inspection_completion_rate) AS 排查任务完成率, TO_CHAR(other_enterprise_hazard_rectification_completion_rate) AS 隐患整改完成率 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_danger_statistics;

SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR('重大危险源或重大场所') AS 企业类型, TO_CHAR(major_hazard_source_inspection_completion_rate) AS 排查任务完成率, TO_CHAR(major_hazard_source_rectification_completion_rate) AS 隐患整改完成率 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_danger_statistics;

question: 园区实时的作业票预警情况？
SQL: SELECT park_code AS 园区名称, COUNT(1) OVER(PARTITION BY park_code) AS 报警数, company_code AS 所属企业, work_no AS 作业编码, alarm_type AS 报警类型, alarm_level_name AS 报警等级, TO_CHAR(alarm_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF') AS 报警开始时间, TO_CHAR(alarm_clear_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF') AS 销警时间, handle_status AS 报警状态 FROM v_ai_ipark_alarm_job WHERE alarm_start_time >= SYSDATE - INTERVAL '3' HOUR;

question: 园区企业人员有多少
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业人员总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(personnel_type) = '企业人员'

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 所属企业名称, TO_CHAR(department) AS 所属部门,TO_CHAR(position) AS 岗位名称, TO_CHAR(name) AS 姓名,TO_CHAR(sex) AS 性别, TO_CHAR(mobilePhone) AS 联系电话,TO_CHAR(personnel_type) AS 人员类型 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(personnel_type) = '企业人员'

question: 园区人员有多少
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 园区人员总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(personnel_type) = '园区人员'

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 所属企业名称, TO_CHAR(department) AS 所属部门,TO_CHAR(position) AS 岗位名称, TO_CHAR(name) AS 姓名,TO_CHAR(sex) AS 性别, TO_CHAR(mobilePhone) AS 联系电话,TO_CHAR(personnel_type) AS 人员类型 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(personnel_type) = '园区人员'

question: 园区有哪些第三方单位
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 第三方单位总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_unit_base_info
SELECT TO_CHAR(org_name) AS 单位名称,TO_CHAR(social_credit_identifier) AS 社会统一信用代码,TO_CHAR(unit_type) AS 单位类型, TO_CHAR(owner) AS 单位负责人,TO_CHAR(mobile_phone) AS 联系方式 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_unit_base_info

question: 某企业的详细信息
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(abbreviatio) AS 企业简称, TO_CHAR(social_credit_id) AS 统一社会信用代码, TO_CHAR(enterprise_size) AS 企业规模, TO_CHAR(enterprise_status) AS 生产状态, TO_CHAR(industry_level_two) AS 所属行业大类, TO_CHAR(establish_date) AS 成立日期, TO_CHAR(factory_area) AS 厂区面积, TO_CHAR(produce_address) AS 生产场所地址, TO_CHAR(enterprise_leader_name) AS 企业负责人, TO_CHAR(en_leader_mobile_phone) AS 企业负责人手机, TO_CHAR(practitioner_num) AS 从业人员人数, TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) AS 是否涉及两重点一重大, TO_CHAR(rules_on_corporate) AS 是否规上企业, TO_CHAR(enterprise_label) AS 企业标签 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '%{company_name}%';

question: 园区有哪些企业涉及重大危险源
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) AS 是否涉及重大危险源 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) LIKE '%是%';

question: 园区有哪些企业涉及重点监管危险化工工艺
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_supervision_craft) AS 是否涉及重点监管危险化工工艺 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(is_supervision_craft) = '是';

question: 园区有哪些企业涉及重点监管危险化学品
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) AS 是否涉及重点监管危险化学品 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) = '是';

question: 园区某年某月能耗情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(CONCAT(year, '年', month, '月')) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(SUM(energy_consumption)) AS 能耗值 FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(year) = '{year_value}' AND TO_CHAR(month) = '{month_value}'

question: 园区某年能耗情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(year) AS 统计年份, TO_CHAR(SUM(energy_consumption)) AS 能耗值 FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(year) = '{year_value}'

question: 园区某企业某年某月能耗情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(CONCAT(year, '年', month, '月')) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(SUM(energy_consumption)) AS 能耗值 FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(year) = '{year_value}' AND TO_CHAR(month) = '{month_value}' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '%{company_name}%'

question: 园区某企业某年能耗情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(year) AS 统计年份, TO_CHAR(SUM(energy_consumption)) AS 能耗值 FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(year) = '{year_value}' AND TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) LIKE '%{company_name}%'

question: 园区某企业今日风险情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(riskValue) AS 风险指数, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_latest_risk_snapshot WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND TO_CHAR(riskTime) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_CHAR(riskTime) < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_CHAR(companyName) LIKE '%{company_name}%'

question: 园区企业今日风险分布情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(riskLevel) AS 风险等级, TO_CHAR(COUNT(DISTINCT companyCode)) AS 企业数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_latest_risk_snapshot WHERE park_name Like '%{parkName}%' AND riskTime >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND riskTime < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY park_name, riskLevel ORDER BY riskLevel;

question: 园区某年风险等级占比情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(stat_year || '年') AS 日期, TO_CHAR('{riskLevel_value}') AS 风险等级, TO_CHAR(DECODE((highRiskDays + middleRiskDays + generalRiskDays + lowRiskDays), 0, 0, ROUND( {riskLevel_value} * 1.0 / (highRiskDays + middleRiskDays + generalRiskDays + lowRiskDays) * 100, 2))) AS 等级占比 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_park_daily_risk_summary_year WHERE TO_CHAR(stat_year) = '{year_value}';

question: 园区某月风险影响因素分析
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(one_index) AS 一级指标名称, TO_CHAR(deduction_count) AS 扣分次数, TO_CHAR(DECODE(total_deduction, 0, 0, ROUND(deduction_count*1.0 / total_deduction, 4)*100)) AS 扣分占比 FROM (SELECT one_index, deduction_count, SUM(deduction_count) OVER () AS total_deduction FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) = '{year_value}-{month_value}') t ORDER BY deduction_count DESC;

question: 园区某月占比最大的一级风险影响因素
SQL: SELECT 一级指标名称, 扣分次数, 扣分占比 FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(one_index) AS 一级指标名称, TO_CHAR(deduction_count) AS 扣分次数, TO_CHAR(DECODE(total_deduction, 0, 0, ROUND(deduction_count*1.0 / total_deduction, 4)*100)) AS 扣分占比, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DECODE(total_deduction, 0, 0, ROUND(deduction_count*1.0 / total_deduction, 4)*100) DESC, deduction_count DESC) AS rn FROM (SELECT one_index, deduction_count, SUM(deduction_count) OVER () AS total_deduction FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) = '{year_value}-{month_value}') t) t_rank WHERE t_rank.rn = 1;

question: 园区某月企业运行平稳情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(runStableRate) AS 运行平稳率 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_records_company WHERE TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) = '{year_value}-{month_value}';

question: 园区某月某企业运行平稳情况
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) AS 统计月份, TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(runStableRate) AS 运行平稳率 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_records_company WHERE TO_CHAR(stat_year_month) = '{year_value}-{month_value}' AND TO_CHAR(COMPANYNAME) LIKE '%{company_name}%';

question: 某人员详细信息
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(COALESCE(p.park_name, q.org_name)) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '园区人员', NULL, p.enterprise_name)) AS 所属企业名称, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '园区人员', NULL, p.department)) AS 所属部门, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '园区人员', NULL, p.position)) AS 岗位名称, TO_CHAR(p.name) AS 姓名, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '园区人员', NULL, p.jobNumber)) AS 工号, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.sex, '1', '男', '0', '女', p.sex)) AS 性别, TO_CHAR(p.mobilePhone) AS 联系电话, TO_CHAR(p.personnel_type) AS 人员类型, TO_CHAR(p.DEGREE) AS 学历, TO_CHAR(p.speciality) AS 专业, TO_CHAR(p.chemical_education_flag) AS 是否具备化工学历背景, TO_CHAR(DECODE(INSTR(q.qualification_type, '注册安全工程师'), 0, '否', '是')) AS 是否取得注册安全工程师资格, TO_CHAR(q.qualification_type) AS 证书名称, TO_CHAR(q.certificate_no) AS 证书编号, TO_CHAR(q.from_certificate_validity) AS 证书有效期起, TO_CHAR(q.end_validity_certificate) AS 证书有效期止, TO_CHAR(q.licence_iissuing_authority) AS 发证机关, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '园区人员', NULL, q.qualification_type)) AS 证书类型, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '企业人员', NULL, p.department)) AS 园区人员_所属部门, TO_CHAR(DECODE(p.personnel_type, '企业人员', NULL, p.position)) AS 园区人员_岗位名称 FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person p LEFT JOIN v_ai_ipark_safety_people_qlf q ON p.person_id = q.person_id AND p.company_code = q.company_code AND p.enterprise_name = q.enterprise_name WHERE TO_CHAR(p.name) = '{person_name}';

question: 园区有哪些企业涉及两重点一重大
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 两重点一重大企业数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND (TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) = '是' OR TO_CHAR(is_supervision_craft) = '是' OR TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) = '是');

SELECT TO_CHAR(park_name) AS 所属园区, TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) AS 是否是重大危险源,TO_CHAR(is_supervision_craft) AS 是否重点监管危化工艺,TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) AS 是否重点监管危化品 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%' AND (TO_CHAR(is_supervision_chemical) = '是' OR TO_CHAR(is_supervision_craft) = '是' OR TO_CHAR(is_hazard_source) = '是' );

question: 园区有哪些重点监管危化品
SQL: Select Count(*) as 监管危化品总数 From v_ai_ipark_hm_chemical_detail;
SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(chemical_name) AS 化学品中文名, TO_CHAR(cas) AS cas号 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_chemical_detail WHERE TO_CHAR(park_name) LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区有哪些重点监管危化工艺
SQL: Select Count(*) as 监管危化品工艺总数 From v_ai_ipark_hm_craft;

SELECT TO_CHAR(hc.enterprise_name) AS 企业名称,TO_CHAR(hc.crafts_parameters) AS 重点监管化工工艺,TO_CHAR(hc.crafts_type) AS 关联典型工艺装置类型 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_craft AS hc JOIN v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info AS pb ON hc.park_code = pb.park_code WHERE pb.park_name LIKE '%{parkName}%';

question: 园区某家企业的当前的风险分级管控情况？
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(park_code) AS 园区编码, TO_CHAR(company_code) AS 企业编码, TO_CHAR(analysis_completion_rate) AS 风险分析完成率, TO_CHAR(risk_obj_count) AS 风险分析对象数, TO_CHAR(unit_count) AS 风险分析单元数, TO_CHAR(event_count) AS 安全风险事件数, TO_CHAR(measure_count) AS 管控措施数 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_risk_hierarchical WHERE company_code IN (SELECT company_code FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE enterprise_name LIKE '%{company_name}%');

question: 园区AI分析报警情况
SQL: SELECT * FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(channelName) AS 通道名称, TO_CHAR(alarmType) AS 报警类型, TO_CHAR(alarmStartTime) AS 报警开始时间, TO_CHAR(handleStatus) AS 处理状态 FROM v_ai_ipark_alarm_ai_ledger ORDER BY alarmStartTime DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20;

question: 园区企业平均销警时长排名
SQL: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY closeAlarmAverageDuration) AS 排名, companyName AS 企业名称,closeAlarmAverageDuration AS 平均销警时长 FROM  v_ai_ipark_close_alarm_average_duration ORDER BY 平均销警时长 limit 20;

question: 园区重大风险管控预警情况
SQL: SELECT   warningLevel AS 预警等级, COUNT(*) AS 数量 FROM   v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE  warningLevel IN ('红色预警', '橙色预警', '黄色预警', '蓝色预警') GROUP BY   warningLevel ORDER BY  CASE  WHEN warningLevel = '红色预警' THEN 1 WHEN warningLevel = '橙色预警' THEN 2  WHEN warningLevel = '黄色预警' THEN 3 WHEN warningLevel = '蓝色预警' THEN 4 END;

SELECT TO_CHAR(companyName)  AS 企业名称,TO_CHAR(hazardName) AS 重大危险源名称, TO_CHAR(eventDesc) AS 预警描述, TO_CHAR(warningLevel) AS 预警等级,TO_CHAR(warningStatus) AS 预警状态 FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event limit 20;

question: 园区企业分类监管情况
SQL: SELECT control_type AS 监管类型, COUNT(*) AS 企业数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE control_type IN ('特别管控', '重点关注', '一般兼顾') GROUP BY control_type ORDER BY CASE WHEN control_type = '特别管控' THEN 1 WHEN control_type = '重点关注' THEN 2 WHEN control_type = '一般兼顾' THEN 3 END;

SELECT enterprise_name AS 企业名称, enterprise_status AS 企业状态, enterprise_type AS 企业类型, is_supervision_chemical AS 是否重点监管危化品企业, is_supervision_craft AS 是否重点监管危化工艺企业, control_type AS 管控类型 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info limit  20

question: 某许可证详细信息
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(enterprise_name) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(qualification_type) AS 许可证类型, TO_CHAR(certificate_no) AS 证书编号, TO_CHAR(from_certificate_validity) AS 许可证开始日期, TO_CHAR(end_validity_certificate) AS 许可证结束日期, TO_CHAR(state) AS 许可证状态 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_people_qlf_qlf WHERE qualification_type LIKE '%{qualification_type}%';

question: 园区企业销警及时处置率排名
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY handleRate DESC)) AS 排名, TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(handleRate) AS 销警及时处置率 FROM v_ai_ipark_close_alarm_handle_rate WHERE companyName IS NOT NULL AND handleRate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY handleRate DESC;

question: 园区某家企业上周的双重预防机制运行效果如何
SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR('岱山经济开发区') AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(companyName) AS 企业名称, TO_CHAR(evaluation_level) AS 运行效果, TO_CHAR(analysis_completion_rate) AS 风险分析完成率, TO_CHAR(check_completion_rate) AS 隐患排查完成率, TO_CHAR(corrective_completion_rate) AS 隐患整改完成率 FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE TO_CHAR(calendar_year) = '{year_value}' AND TO_CHAR(cycle_number) = '{week_value}' AND company_code IN (SELECT company_code FROM v_ai_ipark_sys_person WHERE enterprise_name LIKE '%{company_name}%');

question: 园区今日的风险类别分布情况
SQL: SELECT CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE) AS 日期, SUM(a.BLACKLIST_RISK_COUNT) AS 黑名单风险数量, SUM(a.PERSONNEL_VIOLATION_COUNT) AS 人员违规数量, SUM(a.GAS_ANALYSIS_RISK_COUNT) AS 气体分析风险数量, SUM(a.QUALIFICATION_EXPIRATION_RISK_COUNT) AS 资质过期风险数量, SUM(a.AI_VIDEO_ANALYSIS_COUNT) AS AI视频分析数量, SUM(a.PERSON_TESTIMONY_MISMATCH_COUNT) AS 人员证言不匹配数量, SUM(a.THIRD_PARTY_UNIT_VIOLATION_COUNT) AS 第三方单位违规数量, SUM(a.TOTAL_RISK_ITEM_COUNT) AS 总风险项数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis a WHERE CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE) = CAST(SYSDATE AS DATE) GROUP BY CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE);

question: 园区近7日的风险类别分布情况
SQL: SELECT p.PARK_NAME AS 园区名称, CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE) AS 日期, SUM(a.BLACKLIST_RISK_COUNT) AS 黑名单风险数量, SUM(a.PERSONNEL_VIOLATION_COUNT) AS 人员违规数量, SUM(a.GAS_ANALYSIS_RISK_COUNT) AS 气体分析风险数量, SUM(a.QUALIFICATION_EXPIRATION_RISK_COUNT) AS 资质过期风险数量, SUM(a.AI_VIDEO_ANALYSIS_COUNT) AS AI视频分析数量, SUM(a.PERSON_TESTIMONY_MISMATCH_COUNT) AS 人员证言不匹配数量, SUM(a.THIRD_PARTY_UNIT_VIOLATION_COUNT) AS 第三方单位违规数量, SUM(a.TOTAL_RISK_ITEM_COUNT) AS 总风险项数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis a INNER JOIN v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info p ON a.PARK_CODE = p.PARK_CODE WHERE a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6' DAY AND a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1' DAY GROUP BY p.PARK_NAME, CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE) ORDER BY p.PARK_NAME, CAST(a.LATEST_RISK_ANALYSIS_TIME AS DATE) DESC;

question: 园区最近1月的风险类别分布情况
SQL: SELECT park_info.PARK_NAME AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(ra.WORK_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM') AS 日期, risk_category AS 风险类别, SUM(risk_count) AS 数量 FROM (SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '黑名单风险' AS risk_category, BLACKLIST_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '人员违规' AS risk_category, PERSONNEL_VIOLATION_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '气体分析风险' AS risk_category, GAS_ANALYSIS_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '资质过期风险' AS risk_category, QUALIFICATION_EXPIRATION_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, 'AI视频分析' AS risk_category, AI_VIDEO_ANALYSIS_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '人员证词不匹配' AS risk_category, PERSON_TESTIMONY_MISMATCH_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '第三方单位违规' AS risk_category, THIRD_PARTY_UNIT_VIOLATION_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -1)) ra INNER JOIN v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info park_info ON ra.PARK_CODE = park_info.PARK_CODE GROUP BY park_info.PARK_NAME, TO_CHAR(ra.WORK_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM'), risk_category ORDER BY 日期 DESC, 园区名称, 数量 DESC

question: 园区近6月的风险类别分布情况
SQL: SELECT park_info.PARK_NAME AS 园区名称, TO_CHAR(ra.WORK_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM') AS 日期, risk_category AS 风险类别, SUM(risk_count) AS 数量 FROM (SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '黑名单风险' AS risk_category, BLACKLIST_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '人员违规' AS risk_category, PERSONNEL_VIOLATION_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '气体分析风险' AS risk_category, GAS_ANALYSIS_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '资质过期风险' AS risk_category, QUALIFICATION_EXPIRATION_RISK_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, 'AI视频分析' AS risk_category, AI_VIDEO_ANALYSIS_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '人员证词不匹配' AS risk_category, PERSON_TESTIMONY_MISMATCH_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6) UNION ALL SELECT PARK_CODE, WORK_START_TIME, '第三方单位违规' AS risk_category, THIRD_PARTY_UNIT_VIOLATION_COUNT AS risk_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis WHERE WORK_START_TIME >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6)) ra INNER JOIN v_ai_ipark_safety_park_basic_info park_info ON ra.PARK_CODE = park_info.PARK_CODE GROUP BY park_info.PARK_NAME, TO_CHAR(ra.WORK_START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM'), risk_category ORDER BY 日期 DESC, 园区名称, 数量 DESC

question: 园区土地规划信息
SQL: SELECT AREA_NAME AS 园区名称, AREA_NAME AS 片区名称, PLAN_AREA AS 规划面积, INDUSTRIAL_LAND AS 产业用地, INDUSTRIAL_LAND AS 工业生产用地, DEVELOPMENT_LAND AS 可供开发用地, INEFFICIENT_LAND AS 低效腾退用地 FROM V_AI_IPARK_IPARK_IA_LAND_PLAN;

question: 园区某年经济运行情况
SQL: SELECT PARK_NAME as 园区名称, YEAR as 年份,month as 月份, OUTPUT_VALUE as 产值, TAXATION as 税收, REVENUE as 营收, PROFIT as 利润 FROM V_AI_IPARK_IA_ENTERPRISE_OUTPUT_VALUE WHERE YEAR = '{year_value}'

question: 介绍下园区信息
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 企业总数 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT '有限责任公司【' || COUNT_LLC || '】家，其他（含股份公司、外资等）【' || COUNT_OTHER || '】家。' AS RESULT FROM (SELECT SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_type, ''), '有限责任公司')), 1, 1, 0)) AS COUNT_LLC, SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_type, ''), '有限责任公司')), 1, 0, 1)) AS COUNT_OTHER FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info) T;

SELECT '企业规模：大型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '大', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '中型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '中', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '小型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '小', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '微型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '微', 1, 0)) || '】家' AS 企业规模分布 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT '规上企业【' || TO_CHAR(count_guishang) || '】家，' || '国高企业【' || TO_CHAR(count_guogao) || '】家，' || '专精特新【' || TO_CHAR(count_zhuanjingte) || '】家，' || '绿色示范【' || TO_CHAR(count_lvse) || '】家，' || '其他【' || TO_CHAR(count_qita) || '】家' AS result FROM (SELECT SUM(DECODE(rules_on_corporate, '1', 1, 0)) AS count_guishang, SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '高新技术')), 1, 1, 0)) AS count_guogao, SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '专精特新')), 1, 1, 0)) AS count_zhuanjingte, SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '绿色示范')), 1, 1, 0)) AS count_lvse, SUM(DECODE(DECODE(rules_on_corporate, '1', 0, 1), 1, DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '高新技术') + INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '专精特新') + INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '绿色示范')), 0, 1, 0), 0)) AS count_qita FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info) T;

SELECT '行业分布‌：' || LISTAGG(industry_level_two || '行业' || cnt || '家', '，') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS result FROM (SELECT industry_level_two, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE industry_level_two IS NOT NULL AND industry_level_two != '' GROUP BY industry_level_two) T;

question: 介绍下某企业
SQL: SELECT info.enterprise_name AS 企业名称, info.enterprise_label AS 企业类型与荣誉, info.practitioner_num AS 企业规模与员工, info.industry_level_two AS 主营业务与产业链环节, growth.统计年份, growth.统计年份总产值, growth.环比增速 FROM V_AI_IPARK_SAFETY_ENTERPRISE_INFO info CROSS JOIN (WITH enterprise_yearly_data AS (SELECT year, SUM(output_value) AS total_output_value FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE enterprise_name LIKE '%{company_name}%' AND year IN (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - 1, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - 2) GROUP BY year), pivoted_data AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(DECODE(year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - 1, total_output_value)), 0) AS output_value_curr_minus_1, COALESCE(MAX(DECODE(year, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - 2, total_output_value)), 0) AS output_value_curr_minus_2 FROM enterprise_yearly_data) SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - 1 AS 统计年份, output_value_curr_minus_1 AS 统计年份总产值, DECODE(output_value_curr_minus_2, 0, NULL, ROUND((output_value_curr_minus_1 - output_value_curr_minus_2) / output_value_curr_minus_2 * 100, 2)) AS 环比增速 FROM pivoted_data) growth WHERE info.enterprise_name LIKE '%{company_name}%';

question: 介绍下企业信息
SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 园区企业数目, SUM(DECODE(park_name, '东区', 1, 0)) AS 东区, SUM(DECODE(park_name, '西区', 1, 0)) AS 西区 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT park_name || '企业列表: ' || '[' || LISTAGG(enterprise_name, '，') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY enterprise_name) || ']' AS 企业列表 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE park_name IN ('东区', '西区') GROUP BY park_name ORDER BY park_name;

SELECT '生产状态：正常生产' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_status, '正常生产', 1, 0)) || '家，' || '试生产' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_status, '试生产', 1, 0)) || '家，' || '未投产' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_status, '未投产', 1, 0)) || '家。' AS result FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT '企业规模：大型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '大', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '中型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '中', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '小型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '小', 1, 0)) || '】家，' || '微型企业【' || SUM(DECODE(enterprise_size, '微', 1, 0)) || '】家' AS 企业规模分布 FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT '专精特新小巨人：' || SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '专精特新')), 1, 1, 0)) || '家。' || '高新技术企业：' || SUM(DECODE(SIGN(INSTR(NVL(enterprise_label, ''), '高新技术')), 1, 1, 0)) || '家。' AS result FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info;

SELECT LISTAGG(enterprise_name || '：' || enterprise_name || '位于[' || produce_address || ']，' || '厂区面积：' || factory_area || '平方公里，' || '统一社会信用代码[' || social_credit_id || ']，' || '成立日期[' || establish_date || ']，' || '注册资金' || '暂无' || '万元，' || '从业人员数量' || practitioner_num || '人。' || '企业负责人是' || enterprise_leader_name || '，联系方式为[' || en_leader_mobile_phone || ']。' || '安全负责人是' || enterprise_leader_name || '，联系方式为[' || en_leader_mobile_phone || ']。', CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY enterprise_name) AS result FROM v_ai_ipark_safety_enterprise_info WHERE enterprise_name IN ('浙江世倍尔新材料有限公司', '润和催化材料（浙江）有限公司');

question: 介绍下园区安全态势
SQL: SELECT NVL(sub.当日作业总数, 0) AS 当日作业总数, NVL(sub.正在进行中作业数, 0) AS 正在进行中作业数, NVL(sub.今日已结束作业数, 0) AS 今日已结束作业数, NVL(sub.今日动火作业数, 0) AS 今日动火作业数, NVL(sub.今日受限空间作业数, 0) AS 今日受限空间作业数 FROM dual LEFT JOIN (SELECT NVL(main.total_today_work_count, 0) AS 当日作业总数, NVL(main.ongoing_work_count, 0) AS 正在进行中作业数, NVL(main.completed_today_work_count, 0) AS 今日已结束作业数, NVL(special.hot_work_count, 0) AS 今日动火作业数, NVL(special.confined_space_work_count, 0) AS 今日受限空间作业数 FROM v_ai_ipark_job_today_duration main LEFT JOIN v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_today special ON main.park_code = special.park_code AND TRUNC(main.query_date) = TRUNC(special.query_date) WHERE TRUNC(main.query_date) = CURRENT_DATE) sub ON 1 = 1;

SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS 当前时间, park_name AS 园区名称, riskTime AS 风险统计时间, riskValue AS 园区风险值, riskLevel AS 园区风险等级 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_park_daily_risk_summary_park ORDER BY riskTime DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

SELECT NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_ai_ipark_alarm_ai_ledger), 0) AS 报警总数, NVL(SUM(DECODE(t.handleStatus, '待处理', 1, 0)), 0) AS 今日待处理报警数, NVL(COUNT(t.alarmStartTime), 0) AS 今日新增报警数 FROM DUAL LEFT JOIN v_ai_ipark_alarm_ai_ledger t ON TRUNC(t.alarmStartTime) = TRUNC(SYSDATE);
